themes.label: Truth
themes.summary: This chapter brings truth, faithfulness, revelation, or the trustworthiness of God into focus. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "הָֽעֵדֻת֙: the testimony - testimony".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "אִשֶּׁ֖ה: made by fire - properly, a burnt-offering; but occasionally of any sacrifice".

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "הַשֻּׁלְחָן֙: And the table - a table (as spread out); by implication, a meal".
